steps.title: Translate Lena's amount
steps.content:
Lena has $3$ times as many dollars as Omar, so Lena's amount is
$$
l=3o
$$

steps.title: Translate the total
steps.content: Together, their dollar amounts add to $36$, so the second equation is $$ l+o=36 $$ The system with both equations is choice A. The answer is A.
